subject: Fermi  trigger No 671729344: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)


MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB220415.65 (trigger No 671729344,19h 53m 31.20s , -79d 49m 12.0s, R=3.87) errorbox  77981 sec after notice time and 1 days 13922 sec after trigger time at 2022-04-16 19:21:02 UT, with upper limit up to  17.4 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 65 deg. The sun  altitude  is -39.6 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -30 deg., longitude l = 314 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1944411

We obtain a following upper limits.
